text.div:
Generated Narrative: ValueSet botswana-amr-organism-vs

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 410607006 (Organism (organism))
  • Include all codes defined in http://bw.health.gov/fhir/ImplementationGuide/bw-amr-ig/CodeSystem/botswana-amr-local-organism-cs version 📦0.1.0

name: BotswanaAMROrganismVS
title: Botswana AMR Organism ValueSet
description: Organisms identified in Botswana AMR surveillance. Includes all descendants of SNOMED CT 'Organism' (410607006) plus local codes for organism combinations that labs report together.
